title: Pilosella ullepitschii

Pilosella ullepitschii is further classified as a member of the subgenus Eunomus. The classification of Pilosella ullepitschii is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, and Family: Asteraceae.
